current: F1 (done, epJSON only; Python reset hook pending code-fixer)

2026-04-23_P5P7_fix.summary: Fix P_5 + P_7 chiller-kill direction bug (moved kill block from charge branch to discharge branch, SOC threshold 0.02 -> 0.15)

smoke_results.7day_A_charge_TES_Set_-0.5: chiller ca_min=1.0 (always ON), SOC 0.97->0.93 (micro-drop), air_max=35.05°C, PASS
smoke_results.7day_B_discharge_TES_Set_+0.5: chiller OFF until SOC<0.15 (step 251), then 100% recovery; SOC 0.80->0.016; air_max=40.24°C (过放期已知 §9.10); facility_elec -6.8% vs A (节能显现); PASS

F1.summary: TES initial SOC randomization - convert TES_Charge_Setpoint from Schedule:Constant to Schedule:Compact, prepared for per-episode random T_init injection
F1.rationale: Integration pilot v2 identified 'TES dead' pattern (year_cycles=1, SOC flat at 0.36, no TOU response). Root cause: every ep starts with tank full (6°C, SOC=1.0), agent learned bias toward 'always discharge' strategy. Need random initial SOC to expose agent to full state space (arXiv:2601.22880).

design_decision.selected: Option B (epJSON Schedule:Compact with Python reset hook)
design_decision.rejected_A: EMS actuator on tank nodes - E+ 23.1 ChilledWater:Stratified exposes no node temperature actuator
design_decision.rejected_A_also: initial_temperature field - E+ 23.1 IDD schema does not include this field for Stratified (only autosizing reference)
design_decision.rejected_C: EMS brute-force preheating - would pollute first few steps data, physically dirty

probe_findings.probe_1_tools/m1/probe_tank_initial_T.py: tank nodes initialized to setpoint_schedule's first-step value (TES_Charge_Setpoint=6 -> nodes=6.0; =10 -> nodes=10.0)
Schedule:Compact with Until 00:15=T_init + Until 24:00=6.0 works (step1 nodes=T_init, step2+ setpoint=6.0)
probe_findings.probe_3_tools/m1/probe_ems_setpoint_init: EMS actuator write at BeginNewEnvironment cannot affect tank init (tank initialized before EMS executes)

python_change_request_to_code_fixer.location: After self.building is loaded (in update_weather_path/update_evaluation_weather_path) OR after self.model.update_weather_path() in EplusEnv.reset()
python_change_request_to_code_fixer.seed_requirement: MUST use np_random seeded by gym reset() to ensure reproducibility across seeds
python_change_request_to_code_fixer.smoke_validation: env.reset() x3 -> check obs[12] (TES_Avg_Temp_Obs) first-step values differ by >0.1
